checks.label: 关键约束保留
checks.note: 检查 persistentRequirements、authorization、feedback 是否仍可回溯原文。

checks.label: 子 Agent 使用记忆
checks.note: 优先检查结构化回执 memoryUsed；旧任务回退检查派发与 Worker 文本中的项目/历史/文档记忆引用。

checks.label: 子 Agent 记忆可靠性
checks.note: 按子 Agent 汇总 memoryUsed/memoryIgnored、压缩候选分类纪律和 post-compact 首派发 marker，定位不可靠的第三方会话。

checks.label: 压缩边界时间线
checks.note: 把 token 压力、恢复审计、首派发、候选使用、子 Agent 可靠性和类型化召回串成同一条 compact boundary 诊断时间线。

checks.label: 压缩策略决策
checks.note: 对齐 Claude Code session-memory compact 决策路径：每个压缩边界都要说明为何选择 normal/micro/partial/PTL/recent-window 策略，并记录 token 压力、保留窗口、raw transcript 和 invariants。

checks.label: 压缩后清理审计
checks.note: 对齐 Claude Code runPostCompactCleanup：压缩后必须记录派生状态清理、子 Agent 上下文重建、raw transcript 保留、invoked skills/tool continuity 不清除，以及 ledger 可审计性。

checks.label: API Microcompact Edit Plan
checks.note: 对齐 Claude Code apiMicrocompact：为支持 native context-management 的执行器下发 clear thinking / clear tool result / keep recent tool use 的可审计计划；不支持时作为上下文压力提示。

checks.label: API Microcompact 使用回执纪律
checks.note: API microcompact edit plan 一旦下发给子 Agent，结果说明必须声明 native_applied/advisory/ignored/not_supported；第三方 CLI 不得误报 native applied。

checks.label: API Microcompact 原生应用就绪度
checks.note: 原生应用必须绑定 edit/apply/request patch checksum、context_management 请求体和 context-management beta；CLI 执行器保持 advisory。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof
checks.note: native_applied 强证明必须同时满足 verified proof、fresh native_request_adapter telemetry、requestPatchChecksum、task-agent session/snapshot 绑定、execution/runner dispatch 绑定；agent_receipt 来源、stale telemetry 或未绑定 dispatch 都只能算弱证据。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof Repair Work Items
checks.note: 把 native_applied 强证明的 session/snapshot/dispatch/runner/telemetry 缺口物化为群聊主 Agent 可读 sidecar work items；只作为修复队列，不自动创建真实任务。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof Repair Dispatch Candidates
checks.note: 把 native_applied 强证明修复 work items 转成群聊主 Agent 可读派发候选，并保留 proof/session/dispatch/runner/request checksum 元数据；仍只作为上下文，不自动创建真实任务。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof Repair Dispatch Briefs
checks.note: 把 native proof repair dispatch candidates 编译成主 Agent 可恢复、可复制到 targets[].task 的自包含 worker brief；brief 必须保留 proof/request/session/dispatch/runner 元数据，仍不自动创建真实任务。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof Repair Assignment Bindings
checks.note: 当主 Agent 把 native proof repair dispatch brief 整理成 assignment 时，必须持久化 brief->assignment->WorkerContextPacket 绑定，并保留 proof/request/session/dispatch/runner 元数据。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Context Usage Budget
checks.note: 对齐 Claude Code /context：每个下发给第三方子 Agent 的 WorkerContextPacket 必须携带按类别拆分的上下文用量、free space、autocompact buffer，并在渲染文本中可见。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Context Usage Reactive Repair Work Items
checks.note: 对齐 Claude Code prompt-too-long/reactive compact：当子 Agent WorkerContextPacket 达到 compact_recommended/critical/over_budget 时，Memory Center 必须物化主 Agent 可领取的上下文压缩修复 work item。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Context Usage Repair Typed Memory
checks.note: 当 WorkerContextPacket context usage repair 反复出现时，必须沉淀为 feedback typed MEMORY.md，让后续子 Agent 会话召回 compact/crop、free_tokens、autocompact buffer 和 Context usage budget 纪律。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Recall Typed Memory Usage
checks.note: 当 WorkerContextPacket 处于 critical/over_budget 时，typed MEMORY.md 必须召回上下文压力修复记忆；子 Agent 回执还必须用 memoryUsed/memoryIgnored 反馈这些 pressure recall 是否被使用，形成可评分闭环。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Cross-Group Pressure Recall Usage
checks.note: 跨群聊同项目 pressure typed MEMORY.md 使用反馈必须可审计：本群聊历史优先，跨群聊只补缺；同项目限定、陈旧提示和冲突提示必须在 Memory Center 可见。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Cross-Group Pressure Recall Usage Repair Work Items
checks.note: 把跨群聊同项目 pressure MEMORY 使用冲突和 stale-only 证据物化为群聊主 Agent 可读 repair work items；只进入修复队列，不自动创建真实任务。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Memory Provenance Receipt Pre-Dispatch Discipline
checks.note: 当 WorkerContextPacket pressure recall 下发 disputed/stale-under-repair typed MEMORY.md 时，首次派发前必须注入 memoryProvenanceUsage discipline、acceptance gate、usage category 和可复制示例，减少事后 repair。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Memory Provenance Receipt Post-Dispatch Compliance
checks.note: 当 WorkerContextPacket 已在首派发注入 pressure provenance discipline 后，最终子 Agent 回执必须真实履行 memoryProvenanceUsage；违约按 project/agentType 归因并沉淀为 typed feedback memory。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Feedback Dispatch Policy
checks.note: 当 Phase 137 已把高频 pressure provenance 回执违约沉淀成 typed feedback memory 后，后续匹配 agentType/project 的 WorkerContextPacket 必须注入 dispatch feedback policy，要求 ACK 和最终回执复核。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Feedback Policy Recovery
checks.note: 当 Phase 137/138 已有高频 pressure provenance 回执违约，但后续同一 agentType/project 产生足量 compliant memoryProvenanceUsage 回执时，feedback dispatch policy 必须把历史违规降为 recovered/monitor，而不是永久保持 active 惩罚。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Feedback Policy Relapse
checks.note: 当某个 agentType/project 已通过 compliant receipts 恢复，但之后又出现 pressure provenance 回执违规时，feedback policy 必须标记 relapsed 并重新激活严格 ACK/最终回执复核。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Feedback Policy Repair Work Items
checks.note: 当 pressure provenance feedback policy 因 relapsed=true 或 effective violations 仍高而 active 时，必须自动生成 group-main-agent 可领取的 repair work item，要求先修复 memoryProvenanceUsage/currentSourceVerified 回执纪律再继续普通派发。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Feedback Compliance Health
checks.note: 把 pressure provenance feedback policy、recovery、relapse 与 repair work items 聚合成每个 agentType/project 的健康行；活跃或复发策略必须带 open repair backlog，供群聊主 Agent 调度第三方子 Agent 前判断风险。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Feedback Provider Dispatch Advisory
checks.note: 把 agentType/project compliance health 转成主 Agent 派发前可读的 provider advisory；critical runner 必须 hold，存在更健康候选时应优先选择更健康 runner。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Provider Dispatch Gate
checks.note: 当 provider advisory 判定 selected agentType/project 为 critical 时，实际 WorkerContextPacket 派发 binding 必须渲染 advisory，并由 pre-dispatch gate 阻断该第三方子 Agent 会话直到 repair/recovery。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Provider Dispatch Decision Ledger
checks.note: 主 Agent 每次把 provider advisory 应用于第三方子 Agent 派发时，必须把 hold/dispatch/sampling 决策写入 binding ledger，且 decision action 必须和 advisory/pre-dispatch gate 一致。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Provider Dispatch Override Receipts
checks.note: 只有结构化用户批准 receipt 才能临时 override pressure provenance provider hold；receipt 必须声明 approved_by、risk_accepted、acknowledges_repair_required、reason，并保留后续 repair/recovery 义务。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Provider Dispatch Override Follow-ups
checks.note: 每次 provider hold 被 override 放行后，必须创建 follow-up repair work item，并在子 Agent 完成回执中用 memoryProvenanceUsage/currentSourceVerified=true 补强证据后关闭该 work item。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Provider Dispatch Override Follow-up Typed Memory
checks.note: provider hold 被 override 放行并完成 follow-up repair 后，完成回执必须沉淀为 feedback typed MEMORY.md，下一次子 Agent 新会话可召回该风险和修复闭环。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Provider Dispatch Override Follow-up Pre-dispatch Policy
checks.note: 已完成的 provider dispatch override follow-up typed memory 必须进入 pre-dispatch policy row；它可作为 repaired-history 信号触发 receipt sampling，但不能覆盖新的 active hold。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Provider Dispatch Override Follow-up Receipt Contract
checks.note: 当 repaired-history 让 provider dispatch 进入 receipt sampling 时，WorkerContextPacket 必须向子 Agent 注入 provider override follow-up receipt contract，并要求最终回执重验当前源。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Provider Dispatch Override Follow-up Receipt Contract Validation
checks.note: 当 repaired-history sampling dispatch 完成后，最终子 Agent receipt 必须通过 provider override follow-up contract validation，覆盖 relPath/work item/override id 并标记当前源已复核。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Provider Dispatch Override Follow-up Receipt Validation Repair
checks.note: Phase 152 validation 失败必须自动生成 open repair work item、dispatch candidate 和自包含 corrected-receipt retry brief；验证通过后必须关闭同一 work item 并退出 ready brief。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Provider Override Follow-up Receipt Validation Typed Memory Policy
checks.note: 每次 corrected-receipt validation 必须追加到 feedback typed MEMORY.md；连续失败必须升级 provider hold，验证修复必须清零 active streak、恢复 monitored sampling，并保留全部失败审计历史。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Cross-Group Provider Reliability Guidance
checks.note: 全局/跨群 provider reliability 只允许输出时间衰减后的脱敏聚合值；同一根群聊的多个会话只能算一个来源，必须通过独立群聊、新鲜度和单来源占比晋升门槛，且只能增加 sampling/monitoring，不能覆盖本群 local-first hold/allow 决策。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Provider Reliability Snapshot Ranking
checks.note: 全局 provider reliability 快照必须通过 TTL、payload/snapshot checksum 和来源代次校验；只有 fresh 快照可以排序显式配置的同项目 runner，排序不得自动替换当前 assignment，也不得绕过本群 hold。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Provider Switch Decision Receipt
checks.note: Provider reliability 只能提出 advised alternative；只有 fresh/checksummed decision receipt 加本地权限和任务兼容证据才能批准切换。批准后必须绑定实际子 Agent session，最终由 CCM 真实 runner/session 与子 Agent providerSwitchExecution 双重证明 executed provider。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Provider Switch Execution Typed Memory
checks.note: provider switch 的系统执行回执必须沉淀为 feedback typed MEMORY.md，并在后续子 Agent 新会话 pre-dispatch policy 中作为本地执行反馈使用；passed 历史不能自动授权未来切换，mismatch 历史必须进入采样/hold。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Provenance Feedback Recall Risk Gating
checks.note: 当某个 agentType/project 已有高频 pressure provenance 回执违约，且压力 MEMORY.md 带 disputed_under_repair 或 stale_evidence_under_repair 风险时，typed MEMORY.md 召回必须被 feedback policy 降权、门控或标记 repair-first。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Memory Provenance Receipts
checks.note: 当 WorkerContextPacket 向子 Agent 下发 disputed/stale-under-repair pressure MEMORY.md 时，子 Agent 必须用 memoryProvenanceUsage 逐条声明使用状态、repair work item、provenanceStatus 和 currentSourceVerified。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Memory Provenance Receipt Repair Dispatch Candidates
checks.note: 把 pressure memory provenance receipt repair work items 转成主 Agent 可读派发候选，并保留 worker_context_packet_id、binding、relPath、repairWorkItemId、memoryProvenanceUsage 修复 prompt；仍只作为规划上下文，不自动创建真实任务。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Memory Provenance Receipt Repair Dispatch Briefs
checks.note: 把 pressure memory provenance receipt repair candidates 编译成主 Agent 可复制给子 Agent 的 corrected-receipt worker brief；brief 必须包含 CCM_AGENT_RECEIPT.memoryProvenanceUsage、repairWorkItemId、provenanceStatus 和 currentSourceVerified 约束。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Memory Provenance Receipt Repair Dispatch Brief Required Docs
checks.note: Corrected-receipt dispatch briefs for pressure memory provenance must carry every required pressure MEMORY.md relPath and repairWorkItemId into metadata and worker_task before the main Agent asks a child Agent to correct CCM_AGENT_RECEIPT.memoryProvenanceUsage.

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pressure Memory Provenance Receipt Repair Typed Memory
checks.note: 当 pressure memory provenance receipt repair 反复出现时，必须沉淀为 feedback typed MEMORY.md，让后续子 Agent 会话能召回 memoryProvenanceUsage / repairWorkItemId / currentSourceVerified 回执纪律。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Pre-Dispatch Gate
checks.note: 当 WorkerContextPacket 在子 Agent 派发前 over_budget 时，主 Agent 必须把 assignment 标成 dispatchReady=false，并记录 compact_worker_context_packet_before_child_dispatch gate。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Auto Compact Retry
checks.note: 当 pre-dispatch gate 发现 over_budget 时，主 Agent 应先执行确定性 compact/rerender retry；若恢复到预算内则放行，若仍超预算则保留 hold 与 repair work item。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Compact Hook Ledger
checks.note: 每次 WorkerContextPacket 自动 compact/rerender retry 必须有 pre/post hook sidecar，证明压缩前压力、压缩后重注入和最终派发状态可追踪。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Compact Outcome Ledger
checks.note: 每次 WorkerContextPacket 自动 compact retry 完成后，都应写入 outcome ledger，保存 token 恢复、policy 选择、任务正文是否保留，以及 provider ranking provenance 是否保全等长期策略样本，供后续日志蒸馏使用。

checks.label: WorkerContext Compact Outcome Retention Safety
checks.note: Compact outcome retention must preserve unresolved completion-memory failures, latest assignment/resolution evidence and strict group isolation while compacting superseded diagnostics.

checks.label: Post-Compact Receipt Memory Usage Repair Completion Compaction Preservation
checks.note: Every WorkerContextPacket retry carrying corrected-receipt completion memory must preserve exact required docs, work-item/timeline identity, current task/native session binding, historical-session evidence boundary and receipt acceptance across memory-first, partial compact and PTL downgrade paths.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Closure Conflict Resolution Compaction
checks.note: Conflict-resolution typed memory must preserve exact doc, entry, state, resolving session, reversible branch history and active/reopened acceptance requirements across memory-first, replay partial, metadata partial and PTL compact paths.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Repair Work Items
checks.note: Every failed completion-memory preservation proof must become an idempotent group-main-Agent repair work item; it remains open until a newer exact corrected compact outcome restores identity and current-session authority.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Repair Dispatch Candidates
checks.note: Open completion-memory preservation repair items must surface as exact main-Agent dispatch candidates and must never create a real child task from Memory Center.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Repair Dispatch Briefs
checks.note: Every main-Agent candidate must become a self-contained no-real-task repair brief carrying exact completion identity, failed retry/outcome evidence and current-session authority boundaries.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Corrected-Retry Closure
checks.note: A preservation repair may close only from a newer different compact retry/outcome that restores every completion identity and the exact current task/native session authority boundary.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Repair Closure Typed Memory
checks.note: Every verified Phase 185 corrected-retry closure must distill into group-isolated typed MEMORY.md with exact failed/corrected outcome identity and mandatory future current-source/session revalidation.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Repair Closure WorkerContext Recall
checks.note: Verified preservation closure typed memory must be recallable in every fresh child Agent session with distinct current bindings, exact corrected outcome identity, historical-session evidence only, and memoryUsed/memoryIgnored current-source receipt requirements.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Closure Usage Feedback
checks.note: Every fresh child Agent session that receives closure MEMORY.md must persist a group-isolated memoryUsed/memoryIgnored decision; used or verified requires currentSourceVerified=true, while ignored requires a reason.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Closure Receipt Repair
checks.note: Noncompliant closure-memory receipts must enter the existing main-Agent corrected-receipt repair sidecar without Memory Center creating a real child task.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Closure Recall Priority
checks.note: Repeated ignored or noncompliant feedback may lower generic closure recall priority, but exact corrected-outcome recall and immutable closure history must remain available and group-isolated.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Closure Feedback Aging And Task Family
checks.note: Closure-memory feedback must decay by age and affect only a related task family; unrelated work, exact identity recall, immutable history and authorization boundaries remain unchanged.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Closure Feedback Evidence Confidence
checks.note: Closure-memory ranking feedback must deduplicate reused sessions and packets, weight receipt-source reliability, require independent-session confidence before generic suppression, and never grant authorization.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Closure Feedback Conflict Arbitration
checks.note: Contradictory reliable used/verified and ignored closure feedback must preserve both branches, neutralize historical ranking, and require current-session verification in WorkerContext without granting historical-majority authority.

checks.label: Post-Compact Completion Memory Preservation Closure Conflict Resolution
checks.note: A newer compliant current-session conflict decision must become reversible typed MEMORY.md, preserve both historical branches, rebind future WorkerContext verification, and reopen when later reliable opposition appears.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Cold Archive Integrity
checks.note: Every immutable conflict-resolution branch must live in a checksum-addressed group-local shard, remain discoverable from the manifest and keep the hot typed-memory index bounded.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Manifest Generation And GC Safety
checks.note: Cold-archive GC requires valid current/previous manifest generations, immutable current-generation copy, recovery simulation, quarantine grace and no open repair references.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Cold Archive Maintenance Controller
checks.note: Background maintenance may verify and dry-run quarantine only; destructive GC requires a valid single-use generation-bound approval receipt and explicit non-background execution.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Read-Only Maintenance Scheduler
checks.note: The cron lifecycle may run idempotent verification and deduplicated advisory notifications only; it must never create tasks, approval receipts or destructive GC actions.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Context And Receipts
checks.note: Pending maintenance notifications may enter only their bound group/audience context; acknowledgement and suppression receipts affect visibility only and never grant task, approval, deletion or cross-group authority.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Delivery Health
checks.note: Real group-main and Global Agent context delivery must be checksum-audited and bounded; repeated unseen critical advice is diagnosed read-only and never creates tasks, approvals, deletion or cross-group authority.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Delivery Retention
checks.note: Retention must pin the current notification state, require a fresh delivery after state recurrence, compact only terminal delivery detail, preserve restart checksum continuity and never merge groups or audiences.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Delivery Recovery
checks.note: Recovery may select only a fully checksummed same-group previous ledger, must quarantine corrupt/interrupted evidence, preserve notification freshness and remain no-task/no-approval/no-delete.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Delivery Evidence Cleanup
checks.note: Every unresolved and latest recovery proof must remain hot; only explicit exact-checksum single-use receipts may remove eligible telemetry evidence, after which terminal diagnostics may compact.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Delivery Cleanup Journal
checks.note: Explicit cleanup must persist intent before deletion, resume only an exact checksummed journal, reconcile metadata without scheduler deletion, support pre-start revocation and preserve the latest recovery proof.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Delivery Cleanup Journal Lease
checks.note: Every cleanup journal mutation must hold one atomic per-receipt lease and a monotonically increasing fencing token; concurrent executors must be excluded and abandoned owners may only be recovered without duplicate deletion or receipt consumption.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Delivery Cleanup Ledger CAS
checks.note: Different receipt leases may interleave, but every shared receipt, journal and quarantine ledger commit must hold the group transaction lock, advance a checksummed revision, preserve concurrent updates and reject overlapping candidate claims.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Delivery Cleanup Commit WAL
checks.note: Every cleanup finalization must durably prepare a checksummed transaction, bind quarantine/receipt/journal after-revisions, recover each interrupted phase without another deletion, and complete the WAL before terminal health passes.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Delivery Cleanup Commit Startup Discovery
checks.note: Startup must enumerate WAL independently of journal rows, auto-recover only exact links, quarantine every unproven transaction with a non-tasking repair work item and dispatch brief, and preserve an auditable compact root for pruned terminal history.

checks.label: Conflict Resolution Maintenance Notification Delivery Cleanup Commit Repair Lifecycle Context
checks.note: Repair work items must remain group-local and checksummed, use explicit claim/dispatch and single-use resolution receipts, expose read-only summaries to Global Agent, and reach a project child Agent only through an exact assignment binding.

checks.label: Cleanup Commit Repair Resolution Transaction
checks.note: Every repair resolution must durably prepare a checksummed transaction before mutating work-item, brief, assignment or receipt ledgers; startup recovery must close exact bound phases without creating tasks, approvals or deletion authority.

checks.label: Cleanup Commit Repair Resolution Transaction Startup Discovery
checks.note: Startup must enumerate repair-resolution WAL directly, recover only exact group-local links, contain every unproven transaction with non-tasking artifacts, and preserve a checksummed compact root for pruned terminal history.

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Work Items
checks.note: 当 WorkerContextPacket compact outcome ledger 发现 provider ranking provenance 或 provider switch decision receipt 在压缩后丢失时，必须物化为群聊主 Agent 可读 repair work item，重新从 typed MEMORY.md 和 receipt 生成子 Agent 可用上下文。

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Dispatch Briefs
checks.note: 把 provider ranking provenance compact repair candidates 编译成主 Agent 可执行 rerender brief；brief 必须携带 typed MEMORY.md row/path、provider switch receipt checksum、compact retry/outcome/hook id，并明确 execution history 只是 ranking evidence 不是授权。

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Consumption
checks.note: provider ranking provenance compact repair brief 进入子 Agent 后，child_agent_receipt 必须用 replayRepairDispatchBriefUsage verified 声明 receipt/checksum、typed MEMORY.md row/path、preserved=true、repairStatus=completed、repairGapType=provider_ranking_provenance_compact，且只在该强证据下关闭 repair work item。

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Typed Memory
checks.note: verified provider ranking provenance compact repair receipts must be distilled into typed MEMORY.md so future child Agent sessions can recall compact-safe provider ranking preservation patterns without treating execution history as authorization.

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Worker Context Recall
checks.note: verified provider ranking provenance compact repair receipt typed MEMORY.md must be injected back into every relevant child Agent WorkerContextPacket, including repeat new sessions after recall-ledger surfacing, while preserving the ranking-evidence-not-authorization boundary.

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Memory Usage Contract
checks.note: When provider ranking compact repair receipt typed memory is recalled, WorkerContextPacket must require memoryUsed/memoryIgnored coverage and preserve the ranking-evidence-not-authorization boundary before child Agent dispatch.

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Memory Usage Receipt
checks.note: After provider ranking compact repair receipt typed memory is injected, the child Agent final receipt must cite provider-ranking-provenance-compact-repair-receipt-memory.md in memoryUsed or memoryIgnored and restate that ranking evidence is not authorization.

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Memory Usage Receipt Required Docs
checks.note: When WorkerContextPacket declares provider ranking memory_receipt_required_doc_rel_paths, child Agent final receipts must cover every required doc relPath in memoryUsed or memoryIgnored with usageState and the ranking-evidence-not-authorization boundary.

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Memory Usage Receipt Repair Work Items
checks.note: 当 provider ranking compact repair receipt typed memory 的 child Agent 最终回执缺失 memoryUsed/memoryIgnored 覆盖或授权边界时，Memory Center 必须物化主 Agent 可认领的 corrected-receipt repair work item。

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Memory Usage Receipt Repair Dispatch Candidates
checks.note: 把 provider ranking memory usage receipt repair work items 转成主 Agent 可读派发候选，并保留 worker_context_packet_id、binding、typed memory doc、memoryUsed/memoryIgnored 修复 prompt 与 ranking-evidence-not-authorization 边界。

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Memory Usage Receipt Repair Dispatch Briefs
checks.note: 把 provider ranking memory usage receipt repair candidates 编译成主 Agent 可复制给子 Agent 的 corrected-receipt worker brief；brief 必须包含 CCM_AGENT_RECEIPT.memoryUsed/memoryIgnored、typed memory doc、usageState、fresh receipt 要求和 ranking-evidence-not-authorization 边界。

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Memory Usage Receipt Repair Dispatch Brief Required Docs
checks.note: Corrected-receipt dispatch briefs for provider ranking memory usage must carry every required memory doc relPath into metadata and worker_task before the main Agent asks a child Agent to correct CCM_AGENT_RECEIPT.memoryUsed/memoryIgnored.

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Memory Usage Receipt Repair Typed Memory
checks.note: 当 provider ranking compact repair typed memory 的 memoryUsed/memoryIgnored 回执纪律反复被修复时，必须蒸馏成 feedback typed MEMORY.md，让后续子 Agent 会话能提前召回 usageState、ranking-evidence-not-authorization 和 fresh provider switch receipt 要求。

checks.label: WorkerContext Provider Ranking Provenance Compact Repair Receipt Memory Usage Receipt Repair Worker Context Injection
checks.note: provider-ranking-memory-usage-receipt-discipline.md must be injected into relevant child Agent WorkerContext packets as a visible receipt discipline contract, not only archived in typed MEMORY.md.

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Compact Strategy Memory
checks.note: 把 WorkerContextPacket compact outcome ledger 蒸馏成可复用策略记忆，记录哪些 metadata category 更容易恢复预算，并让后续子 Agent 上下文压缩策略可引用。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Compact Strategy Typed Memory
checks.note: 把 WorkerContextPacket compact strategy JSON/ledger 进一步写入 typed MEMORY.md，使后续子 Agent 会话能召回 preferred/avoid compact categories、free_token_delta 和 task preservation 经验。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket PTL Emergency Downgrade
checks.note: 当 WorkerContextPacket compact outcome ledger 显示 repeated blocked/任务压缩后仍超预算时，必须生成 PTL emergency hint，并给下一次 retry 提供更短的 memory/replay/metadata/task 压缩预算。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket PTL Emergency Typed Memory
checks.note: 当 PTL emergency downgrade 被触发时，必须沉淀为 feedback typed MEMORY.md，让后续子 Agent 会话能召回 maxTaskChars/maxRenderedChars/replay/metadata 紧急降级预算。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Ignore Memory Policy
checks.note: 当用户显式要求忽略记忆时，WorkerContextPacket 必须把群聊/typed/global memory 当作空，同时保留可审计的 policy、ignored_by_policy proof、memoryIgnored 回执要求和渲染标记。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Ignore Memory Receipt Compliance
checks.note: 当 WorkerContextPacket 声明 memory_policy.ignored=true 时，后续子 Agent 回执必须写 memoryIgnored 并说明 user_requested_ignore_memory，且不得写 memoryUsed 使用历史记忆。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Ignore Memory Receipt Repair Work Items
checks.note: 当 ignore-memory WorkerContextPacket 的子 Agent 回执缺失 memoryIgnored 或误写 memoryUsed 时，Memory Center 必须物化主 Agent 可认领的修复待办。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Ignore Memory Receipt Repair Dispatch Candidates
checks.note: 把 ignore-memory receipt repair work items 转成主 Agent 可读派发候选，并保留 worker_context_packet_id、binding、memoryIgnored 修复 prompt；仍只作为规划上下文，不自动创建真实任务。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Ignore Memory Receipt Repair Dispatch Briefs
checks.note: 把 ignore-memory receipt repair candidates 编译成主 Agent 可复制给子 Agent 的 corrected-receipt worker brief；brief 必须包含 CCM_AGENT_RECEIPT.memoryIgnored、user_requested_ignore_memory 和 memoryUsed 防误用约束。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Ignore Memory Receipt Repair Typed Memory
checks.note: 当 ignore-memory receipt repair 反复出现时，必须沉淀为 feedback typed MEMORY.md，让后续子 Agent 会话能召回 memoryIgnored / memoryUsed 回执纪律。

checks.label: WorkerContextPacket Memory Reinjection Proof
checks.note: 压缩/裁剪 WorkerContextPacket 后，主 Agent 必须证明压缩后的群聊记忆已重新注入最终下发给子 Agent 的 packet 与渲染文本。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof Repair WorkerContextPacket Injection
checks.note: 当 provider/native proof repair brief 绑定到 assignment 后，必须进入真实 WorkerContextPacket，并在渲染给第三方子 Agent 的上下文里保留 provider re-proof/request/session/dispatch/runner 元数据。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof Repair Timeline Bindings
checks.note: 当主 Agent 把 native proof repair dispatch brief 派给真实子 Agent 时，必须持久化 brief->timeline->task session->memory snapshot->execution->receipt 绑定，并保留 runner/proof/request 元数据。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof Repair Receipt Consumption
checks.note: 当 native/provider proof repair brief 进入子 Agent 上下文后，child_agent_receipt 必须用 replayRepairDispatchBriefUsage 或 memoryUsed/memoryIgnored 声明 used/verified/ignored/blocked/strong，形成注入后的消费审计。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Provider Re-proof Receipt Consumption Typed Memory
checks.note: provider re-proof brief 被子 Agent 消费后，used/verified/strong 必须进入 reference typed MEMORY.md，ignored/blocked 必须进入 feedback caution memory，并可被下一次子 Agent 会话召回。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof Repair Timeline Completions
checks.note: 完整的 native proof repair timeline binding 必须能自动关闭匹配的 replay repair work item，形成 child receipt -> repair ledger 的实时闭环。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof Repair Closure Re-proof
checks.note: 把 timeline-proved repair closure 和 native provider strong telemetry 分离：关闭 repair item 只证明修复链闭环，仍要用精确 request/session/execution/snapshot 重新证明 provider request telemetry。

checks.label: API Microcompact Native Apply Proof Repair Closure Re-proof Work Items
checks.note: 把 timeline-closed 但 provider telemetry 仍弱的 native proof re-proof candidate 物化为主 Agent 可领取/派发的 repair work item，并保留 request/session/execution/snapshot 定位字段。

checks.label: 压缩 Hook Ledger
checks.note: 检查 pre/post compact hook 是否有独立 ledger、耗时和失败证据，避免压缩前后上下文增强过程不可追溯。

checks.label: 压缩边界 Replay Gate
checks.note: 只读重放子 Agent 记忆包，验证压缩边界、重注入候选、hook 注入要求和回执契约是否能进入第三方子 Agent 新会话上下文。

checks.label: Replay 修复待办
checks.note: 把 compact boundary replay 的修复动作物化为群聊主 Agent 可读的 sidecar work items；不自动创建真实任务，避免打开诊断页污染任务队列。

checks.label: Replay Repair Ledger Retention Safety
checks.note: Retention may compact superseded terminal diagnostics, but must preserve every open repair, latest strict closure proof, conflict-resolution identity and group boundary.

checks.label: Replay 修复派发候选
checks.note: 把已认领/已派发/高优先级 replay repair work items 转成群聊主 Agent 可读候选；只作为规划上下文，不自动创建真实任务。

checks.label: Post-Compact Reinjection Repair Dispatch Candidates
checks.note: Every open post-compact reinjection repair item must become a main Agent dispatch candidate preserving reinjection gate, candidate identity/value, target project, current-source verification, and child session receipt requirements.

checks.label: Post-Compact Reinjection Repair Dispatch Briefs
checks.note: Every post-compact reinjection repair candidate must compile into a self-contained main Agent dispatch brief preserving gate/candidate identity, current-source verification, used-or-ignored classification, and actual child session receipt requirements.

checks.label: Post-Compact Reinjection Repair Receipt Consumption
checks.note: A post-compact reinjection repair work item may close only after the bound child Agent session consumes the exact brief and classifies the exact gate/candidate with valid postCompactCandidateUsage plus matching memoryUsed/memoryIgnored evidence.

checks.label: Post-Compact Reinjection Repair Receipt Typed Memory
checks.note: Every verified post-compact reinjection repair completion must be distilled into typed MEMORY.md with exact gate/candidate/session/completion identity, while explicitly requiring current-source revalidation before future reuse.

checks.label: Post-Compact Reinjection Repair Receipt Worker Context Recall
checks.note: Relevant fresh child Agent sessions must repeatedly receive post-compact reinjection repair receipt typed memory in WorkerContextPacket, rebound to the new task/native session and requiring a new memoryUsed/memoryIgnored decision with current-source verification.

checks.label: Post-Compact Reinjection Repair Receipt Memory Usage Receipt
checks.note: After post-compact reinjection repair receipt typed memory is injected, the bound child Agent receipt must cover every surfaced doc in memoryUsed or memoryIgnored, reverify current source for used/verified memory, explain ignored memory, preserve the historical-evidence boundary, and match the new task/native session.

checks.label: Post-Compact Reinjection Repair Receipt Memory Usage Repair Work Items
checks.note: Noncompliant post-compact repair receipt memory usage must become an idempotent group-main-Agent repair work item carrying original packet/session identity and every required MEMORY.md relPath.

checks.label: Post-Compact Reinjection Repair Receipt Memory Usage Repair Dispatch Candidates
checks.note: Every open post-compact receipt-memory usage repair item must become a group-main-Agent dispatch candidate preserving required docs, original evidence sessions and new-session corrected-receipt rules.

checks.label: Post-Compact Reinjection Repair Receipt Memory Usage Repair Dispatch Briefs
checks.note: Every post-compact receipt-memory usage repair candidate must compile into a self-contained corrected-receipt brief with required docs, fresh current-source rules, historical evidence boundary and replayRepairDispatchBriefUsage.

checks.label: Post-Compact Reinjection Repair Receipt Memory Usage Repair Receipt Consumption
checks.note: A post-compact receipt-memory usage repair may close only after a full dispatch timeline and a corrected receipt from a new bound task/native session covers every required doc with freshness/ignored-reason rules and the historical-evidence boundary.

checks.label: Post-Compact Receipt Memory Usage Repair Completion Typed Memory
checks.note: Every strictly verified corrected-receipt completion must become idempotent group-scoped typed MEMORY.md with exact original/repair session identity, per-document usage proof and mandatory future current-source reverification.

checks.label: Post-Compact Receipt Memory Usage Repair Completion Worker Context Usage
checks.note: Relevant fresh child Agent sessions must repeatedly receive corrected-receipt completion MEMORY.md, bind its usage contract to the current task/native session, independently report memoryUsed/memoryIgnored, and never treat historical original/repair sessions as current authority.

checks.label: Group Session Memory 快照
checks.note: 对齐 Claude Code Session Memory：每个群聊会话的 summary.md/snapshot.json 必须独立、checksum 可验证，并满足每 section 2000 tokens、总计 12000 tokens 的模型上下文预算；只注入群聊主 Agent 和项目子 Agent，不进入 Global Agent 模型上下文。

checks.label: 工具/技能连续性快照
checks.note: 对齐 Claude Code 的 discovered tools / invoked skills 保留：压缩后必须把工具、技能、缺失项作为上下文恢复，但不能绕过当前授权与 runtime tool gate。

checks.label: Task Agent 记忆上下文快照
checks.note: 每次第三方项目子 Agent 会话必须有可审计的群聊记忆上下文快照：绑定真实 task Agent session、带 worker context packet、gate id、checksum，并支持 Memory Center retention dry-run。

checks.label: 压缩文件引用
checks.note: 对齐 Claude Code compact_file_reference / sessionFileAccessHooks：压缩后把关键记忆来源作为可读文件引用暴露，并追踪子 Agent 是否声明使用。

checks.label: 压缩文件引用读取计划
checks.note: 对齐 Claude Code post-compact file attachment：压缩后给子 Agent 明确的按需读取顺序、source-of-truth 入口和回执要求。

checks.label: 压缩读取计划源新鲜度
checks.note: compact read plan 下发时记录源文件指纹；如果源文件变化，子 Agent 使用前必须重新读取当前源并在回执声明。

checks.label: 压缩读取计划重读门禁
checks.note: 当历史 compact read plan 源文件变化时，子 Agent 回执必须按 read_plan_id 声明已 re-read/current source verified，或在 memoryIgnored 说明不使用。

checks.label: 读取计划重读会话绑定
checks.note: compact read plan stale source 重读回执必须来自收到该 gate 的具体子 Agent 会话；错会话或缺 session 的回执不能证明当前第三方 Agent 会话已重读。

checks.label: 读取计划重读修复待办
checks.note: 当 compact read plan revalidation gate 失败或回执会话不匹配时，把缺口物化为群聊主 Agent 可读 sidecar work items，并进入派发候选上下文。

checks.label: Compact File Reference Read Plan Revalidation Repair Dispatch Candidates
checks.note: Every open compact read-plan revalidation repair item must become a main Agent dispatch candidate preserving gate, read_plan_id, reference and bound task/native session receipt requirements.

checks.label: Compact File Reference Read Plan Revalidation Repair Dispatch Briefs
checks.note: Every compact read-plan revalidation repair candidate must compile into a self-contained main Agent dispatch brief preserving gate, read_plan_id, current-source verification, and bound task/native session receipt requirements.

checks.label: 压缩读取计划回执纪律
checks.note: compact file reference read plan 一旦下发给子 Agent，后续回执或群聊消息应优先用 memoryUsed/memoryIgnored 声明 read_plan_id，形成按需读取计划的使用闭环。

checks.label: 压缩文件引用使用纪律
checks.note: compact file references 一旦下发给子 Agent，后续回执或群聊消息必须用 memoryUsed/memoryIgnored 声明 reference id 或路径，形成压缩上下文使用闭环。

checks.label: 历史压缩边界 Replay
checks.note: 抽样 compaction.boundaries 中的历史压缩边界，验证旧边界的摘要校验、重注入候选和回执契约仍能进入第三方子 Agent 新会话上下文。

checks.label: 子 Agent 类型 Replay
checks.note: 按 Claude Code / Cursor / Codex 等子 Agent 类型分维度重放群聊记忆包，验证每种第三方新会话都能拿到压缩边界、候选使用和回执契约。

checks.label: 压缩候选纪律
checks.note: 检查压缩后重注入候选是否逐条 classified，并防止历史 ignored/归档候选未经 verified 又被 promoted 为 used。

checks.label: 压缩后首派发
checks.note: 检查每个群聊 compact boundary 后的子 Agent 首次派发是否被一次性 marker 记录，并暴露等待或异常序列。

checks.label: RAG 召回准确
checks.note: 轻量模式不执行 RAG 检索；点击“评估压缩质量”运行完整 Top-3 召回检查。

checks.label: 长任务目标一致
checks.note: 检查多轮/恢复任务是否保留原始目标并重新核对验收条件。

checks.label: 摘要来源可追溯
checks.note: 检查群聊消息 ID、项目归档 checksum、全局 sourceMessageIds。

checks.label: 子 Agent 全局记忆桥接
checks.note: 当全局 Agent 长期记忆与群聊/项目子 Agent 任务相关时，必须作为独立、有来源边界的上下文注入子 Agent 记忆包，并纳入 source manifest 与 compact file references。

checks.label: 全局记忆仲裁账本
checks.note: 当全局 Agent 记忆被群聊新证据降权或冲突时，必须写入群聊仲裁账本，并纳入 source manifest 与 compact file references，支持后续 typed memory 蒸馏。

checks.label: 全局记忆仲裁蒸馏
checks.note: 同一全局记忆多次被群聊新证据降权/冲突时，必须自动沉淀为 typed MEMORY.md，供后续子 Agent 稳定召回。

checks.label: 跨群聊全局记忆抑制
checks.note: 当同一全局 Agent 记忆已在其他群聊被降权或冲突时，后续子 Agent 包必须显式降为 background-only，并保留跨群聊仲裁 ledger 来源。

checks.label: 跨群聊抑制新鲜度
checks.note: 当旧跨群聊仲裁证据被更新的 Global Agent 记忆覆盖，或证据超过新鲜度窗口时，子 Agent 包必须把抑制降级为 advisory，并保留来源。

checks.label: Global Agent 记忆自测污染
checks.note: 真实 Global Agent 长期记忆不能含 selftest sentinel；残留测试备份应提示清理，active memory 必须硬失败。
